overview: Geethanjali Institute of Science and Technology (GIST), established in 2008, is a prominent private engineering college located in Nellore, Andhra Pradesh. The institution is known for its rural-to-urban developmental focus, providing technical education to students in the S.P.S.R. Nellore district. GIST is recognized for its strong discipline, modern laboratory infrastructure, and its role as a key technical hub in coastal Andhra Pradesh.
accreditation: Accredited by NAAC with an 'A' Grade. Eligible programs are NBA accredited. Approved by AICTE, New Delhi, and affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Anantapur (JNTUA). ISO 9001:2008 certified.

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, Cyber Security, ECE, EEE, Civil, Mechanical)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + AP EAPCET rank
B.E./B.Tech with 50% aggregate + GATE / AP PGECET score

admissions.admissionProcess: 70% of seats (Category A) are filled via state-level web counseling (APSCHE) based on AP EAPCET ranks. 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on institutional merit. Counseling Code: GIST.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 12–20, 2026; Results: June 1, 2026; Counseling: Expected July 2026; AP POLYCET Application: March–April 2026.

campus.area: Acres of modern infrastructure near Nellore
facilities: Central Library with 30,000+ volumes and Digital Section
Separate In-campus Hostels for Boys and Girls
Transport (Fleet of 25+ buses covering Nellore and nearby towns)
campus.specialNote: GIST is notable for its 'GIST Merit Scholarship' program, which offers significant tuition waivers to high performers in entrance exams. The campus is environmentally conscious and focuses heavily on 'CRT' (Campus Recruitment Training) starting from the second year to maximize student employability.

contact.address: 3rd Mile, Nellore-Bombay Highway, Gangavaram (V), Kovur (M), S.P.S.R Nellore District, Andhra Pradesh - 524137
